title: What It Actually Looks Like to Win Big and Stay Small
caption:
Winning has a way of making a man louder. A godly man learns to let it make him quieter.

Real humility isn't hiding your win. It's giving the credit away before anyone can take it from you, staying correctable when you've got the least reason to, treating the man who can't help your career exactly like the one who can.

Scripture never said stay small to stay safe. It said stay low so you don't lose your footing.

Win the thing. Just don't let the win convince you that you built it alone.

Save this for the next time a win tempts you to forget who built it.

#faith #humility #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #character #brotherhood
